name: TCS (Tata Consultancy Services)

roundDetails.TCS NQT Online Test: Numerical Ability (26 Q / 40 min), Verbal Ability (24 Q / 30 min), Reasoning Ability (30 Q / 50 min), Programming Logic (10 Q / 15 min), Coding (1-2 questions / 60 min)
roundDetails.Technical Interview: Focus on DBMS, OS, CN basics, C/C++/Java OOP, Projects you've done, DSA basics
roundDetails.HR Interview: Behavioral questions, relocation willingness, team adaptation, communication

tips: Practice NQT mock tests from official TCS iON portal
Focus on accuracy over speed
Prepare 2-3 projects from college work
Be clear on your resume tech stack
TCS NQT score determines Prime/Digital/BPS stream

name: Infosys

roundDetails.Reasoning Ability Test: 15 questions in 25 minutes — logical reasoning, seating arrangements, blood relations
roundDetails.Verbal Ability Test: 20 questions in 20 minutes — reading comprehension, grammar, sentence correction
roundDetails.Pseudocode Test: 5 questions in 10 minutes — reading code and predicting output
roundDetails.HR Interview: Communication assessment, project discussion, culture fit

tips: No coding round typically for Systems Engineer role
Infosys Specialist Programmer needs coding (1 medium problem)
Verbal skills are heavily weighted
Practice InfyTQ platform mock tests
Communication matters most in HR

name: Wipro

roundDetails.Aptitude Test: Quantitative (16 Q / 16 min), Logical (14 Q / 14 min), Verbal (22 Q / 18 min), Coding (2 Q / 60 min)
roundDetails.Written Communication: Essay writing on a given topic, assessed for grammar and clarity
roundDetails.Technical Interview: OOP, DBMS, DSA, Project discussion, 1-2 coding questions

tips: AMCAT scores significantly impact shortlisting
Write practice essays for Written Communication test
Prepare STAR-based answers for HR
Know your projects end-to-end
Wipro Elite NTH requires higher AMCAT score

name: Amazon

roundDetails.Online Assessment: 2 coding problems (Medium-Hard LeetCode level), Behavioral Assessment (Amazon Leadership Principles), Work Style questionnaire
roundDetails.Technical Phone Screen: 1-2 coding problems + discussion of approach, time/space complexity analysis
roundDetails.Virtual Onsite: 4-5 back-to-back rounds: 2-3 coding rounds, 1 system design (for SDE2+), 1-2 behavioral (LP) rounds

tips: Master ALL 16 Amazon Leadership Principles with STAR stories
Solve 150+ LeetCode problems (focus on Medium)
Practice Think-out-loud while coding
Know time & space complexity for every solution
Amazon values problem-solving over memorizing algorithms

name: Google

roundDetails.Recruiter Screen: Resume review, role fit discussion, basic background questions
roundDetails.Technical Phone Screen: 45-60 min: 1-2 coding problems on shared editor. Focus on correctness and optimization.
roundDetails.Onsite Loop: 5-6 rounds: 4 coding rounds + 1 Googleyness/behavioral + 1 system design (senior). Each 45 min.

tips: Google asks fundamentals, not tricks — know WHY your algorithm works
Communicate your thought process constantly
Study 'Cracking the Coding Interview' and LeetCode Top 150
For System Design: Practice designing URL Shortener, Twitter Feed, YouTube
Expect 3-6 month preparation for competitive candidates

name: Accenture

roundDetails.Cognitive & Technical Assessment: Abstract reasoning, attention to detail, technical fundamentals (50 Q / 65 min)
roundDetails.Coding Test: 2 coding questions in 45 min (Easy-Medium level), Python/Java/C++
roundDetails.Communication Assessment: AI-powered spoken English evaluation (reading and impromptu speaking)
roundDetails.HR Interview: Background, adaptability, work ethic, role preferences

tips: Communication assessment is AI-graded — speak clearly and confidently
Coding difficulty is relatively low — focus on correctness
Be prepared for 'night shift / rotational shift' questions
Accenture ASE vs Packaged App Associate roles have different tracks
Very high volume — focus on clearing all rounds systematically

name: Microsoft

roundDetails.Technical Interviews: Each round: 1-2 coding problems + behavioral questions. Focus on code quality and edge cases.
roundDetails.AA Interview: Senior engineer evaluates overall fit, culture alignment, and decision-making ability

tips: Microsoft values clean, readable, and well-structured code over speed
Always clarify requirements before coding
Discuss trade-offs in your design decisions
STAR method is essential for behavioral rounds
Growth Mindset is a core Microsoft value — demonstrate it

name: Cognizant (CTS)

roundDetails.GenC Online Test: Quantitative, Reasoning, Verbal, Automata (coding) — 2.5 hours total
roundDetails.Technical Interview: OOPS, DBMS, basic DSA, project discussion

tips: GenC Next has higher package and requires stronger coding skills
Time management is key in the Automata (coding) section
Projects are heavily discussed — prepare 2 projects well
Verbal communication is tested in HR — practice English
Cognizant often conducts off-campus drives — apply broadly
